channel.title: Newsletter on Unknown Entity 1806
channel.description: Recent content in Newsletter on Unknown Entity 1806

item.title: Updates: A time for relaxation
item.description:
Hello 👋

It is time for me to give you another monthly update. Although the previous one was not really that long ago.

The weather here in Spain has not been great the past few weeks. Which means that the plans I had to spend outside have not come to fruition.
Instead I have spend more time behind the computer and playing around with HUGO. I have learned alot. Which has also motivated me to update the theme for this website to version 3.1: lilac-code! 💜

item.title: Updates for April 2026
item.description: Hello everyone! I am back with another monthly update and it is really crazy much fast time has passed, but also, how much has happened in the meantime!

item.title: Updates for March 2026
item.description: Another month, another update on what has been going on in my life.

item.title: Updates for February 2026
item.description: Another month, another update on what is going on behind the scenes.

item.title: Updates for January 2026
item.description: A little bit of my works in progress in January. Some might be finished this month. Others are more ideas that are for further in the future.
